short.en: Triangular bracket calculated for 15 kg/shelf load, printed in PETG with three perimeters.
short.sl: Trikotni nosilec, izračunan za obremenitev 15 kg/polico, tiskan iz PETG-a s tremi obrisi.

description.en: Replaced rusty steel brackets in a damp pantry. Bending moment calculated at 15 kg × 200 mm lever; PETG cross-section at the root sized for σ_allow = 25 MPa with a 2× safety factor. Validated by loading with two-litre bottles.
description.sl: Zamenjava zarjavelih jeklenih nosilcev v vlažni shrambi. Upogibni moment izračunan pri obremenitvi 15 kg × 200 mm vzvoda; PETG prerez ob korenu dimenzioniran za σ_dop = 25 MPa z 2× varnostnim faktorjem. Potrjeno z dvolitrskimi steklenicami.
